triggers: Core security detection logic — false negatives leave users with a false sense of safety
Public-facing API surface (scan results surfaced to end users)
Severity mis-assignment can suppress Critical/High findings that users rely on
Modifications to 6+ scanner modules with cross-cutting impact
Auth and session-security checks directly involved (P1-05 cookies)
lane_rationale: HIGH risk (security reasoning on a security platform) plus cross-cutting changes across 6 modules and potential new module — fails the lane fail-safe regardless of surface size.
